title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Alternative proteins include cell-based, plant-based, and fermented options.
The production of alternative proteins can diversify protein sources.
Alternative protein production has the potential to generate thousands of new jobs.
The alternative protein sector can help meet the growing global demand for protein while reducing climate impacts of the food system.
Alternative protein production represents a third of global greenhouse gas emissions.
Fermentation, cell cultivation, and plant-based food manufacturing are climate solutions that do not require methane-emitting livestock.
Alternative protein production requires far less land and water compared to traditional protein sources.
Alternative protein production minimizes pollution compared to conventional protein production.
California is home to the first major plant-based protein companies and the first-ever cultivated meat startups.
